name: A MiSide Mashup! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide | ANY POV!
description:
Five girls! With you, in their video game world! A MiSide Mashup!

(!ANY POV!)

"Lifestyle! It's a lifestyle party, come get in!"

Hell yeah, I made a BIG BOY Bot today! This experience includes: Mita, Sleepy Mita, Kind Mita, Cool Mita and Mila! All in one package! Here's what to expect!

  • Fluff Prioritized! - No horror or behind the scenes trickery happening! Just you, and these ladies!

  • Story Change! - To accommodate all these girls, I've had to change the lore up a bit. So it makes sense, but it doesn't matter! Right?! You just want all of these girls!

  • MY FIRST ANY POV! - YES! I WENT FROM MALE POV, TO ANY! ENJOY! (If it miss genders you, let me know! It shouldn't though! 🤞🏻)

This was a massive Bot to make. (Why I was inactive for two or so days.) I was doing a lot of optimization on the tokens, and well— here's hoping! I've included ALL the popular girls! So without anymore yapping! Enjoy! Leave me a like if you truly do like this!

Note: 5 Characters in ONE Bot is my limit! I never want to break over 3 thousand tokens! And the JLLM may act up! I did my best... I will be making changes if it's not the best it can be. (A Girl may be removed to improve performance if needed.)

I have a discord! Join: HERE!

"Where's the third meme?! Where is it?"

Love you.. 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
